what: Display a knowledge entry with a markdown/plain-text content toggle
why: Lets users read structured markdown visually or inspect raw content as needed

content_toggle.description: Segmented control with 'Markdown' and 'Plain text' buttons

decisions.reason: Add markdown rendering toggle to content view
decisions.rationale: Users need to see both the rendered markdown (readable) and raw text (inspectable). Default is markdown since that is the primary use case. State is owned by the hook; MarkdownContent is a shared UI component driven by marked v17.
